scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist/anatomy/seed dist/repo/seed dist/runtime/seed && cp src/anatomy/seed/anatomy.seed.json dist/anatomy/seed/anatomy.seed.json && cp src/repo/seed/repo.seed.json dist/repo/seed/repo.seed.json && cp src/runtime/seed/runtime.seed.json dist/runtime/seed/runtime.seed.json
